acceptance_targets: [chapter_08_craft_001] Pass if a read of snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:191, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:267, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:287, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:369, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:419 shows no more than one narration use of the 'careful/carefully/exact' family outside Eszter's quoted line at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:369, and each beat now conveys a distinct physical consequence of Beni's shutdown.

[chapter_08_prose_001] Pass if, on a read of snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:19, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:41, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:115, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:239, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:249, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:293, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:421, at least three of the cited beats now land through direct sensory or action detail rather than an 'as if' clause, a 'He wanted to...' lead-in, or the room being assigned human intention, and no one fallback construction appears more than twice across the chapter.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if a read of snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:191, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:267, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:287, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:369, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:419 shows no more than one narration use of the 'careful/carefully/exact' family outside Eszter's quoted line at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:369, and each beat now conveys a distinct physical consequence of Beni's shutdown.
findings.problem: The chapter keeps naming Beni's shutdown with the same stress-tell vocabulary, especially the 'careful/carefully/exact' family, until the diction starts sounding like the style bible repeated back at the reader instead of fresh scene observation. That weakens the embarrassment and bodily specificity the scene otherwise earns.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the shutdown beats at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:191, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:267, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:287, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:419 so each moment of withdrawal is rendered through a different concrete consequence: one can stay mechanical, another can stay breath- or temperature-based, another can stay tactile. Keep Eszter's explicit diagnosis at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:369, but stop the surrounding narration from echoing the same label.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if, on a read of snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:19, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:41, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:115, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:239, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:249, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:293, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:421, at least three of the cited beats now land through direct sensory or action detail rather than an 'as if' clause, a 'He wanted to...' lead-in, or the room being assigned human intention, and no one fallback construction appears more than twice across the chapter.
findings.problem: The prose leans too often on the same fallback constructions: repeated 'as if' clauses, repeated 'He wanted to...' setup, and repeated room personification. Those moves are effective once or twice, but at this density they become a visible scaffold and flatten the chapter's second-half pressure into a recognizable formula.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the recurring scaffold lines at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:19, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:41, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:115, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:239, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:249, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:293, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:421. Replace at least half of the comparative or anthropomorphic moves with direct object, sound, touch, or action detail so the room's pressure and Beni's hesitation land without the same sentence template doing the work each time.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into asymmetry, embarrassment, appetite, and the material costs of intimacy. When an edge case appears, choose the version that preserves class pressure, erotic consequence, and bodily specificity rather than smoothing the scene into tasteful distance or soft-focus safety.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene naturally contains sexual awkwardness, bodily shame, class contempt, grief, or moral compromise, vague tasteful phrasing counts as a failed draft and must be rewritten toward concrete consequence.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the norm in spoken English here; uncontracted forms should appear mainly for precision, social performance, or emphasis.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Vary chapter feel through scene count, dialogue density, movement versus waiting, and whether the turn comes from confrontation, discovery, aftermath, preparation, or unwanted intrusion. A nocturnal chauffeur chapter should not be followed by another chapter with the same pulse and architecture; counter hard chapters with domestic or reflective ones that still advance consequence.
prose_style_profile.diction: Plainspoken but exact, materially grounded, and alert to social register; imagery should emerge from labor, appetite, weather, and bodily memory rather than from decorative abstraction.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third person anchored to Beni, with memory pressure and sensory bleed but no roaming omniscience.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate compressed, road-tight paragraphs with slower observational passages that let smell, touch, and silence accumulate; keep sentence music controlled rather than showy.
